input.headline: You should be having more slumber parties with your friends

raw.headline: You should be having more slumber parties with your friends

winner: Why did my friend uninvite me from her slumber party? She said I was the *sleep* of the problem!

candidates.text: I tried having a slumber party with my friend’s pet iguana—turns out, he’s a terrible snitch and won’t keep secrets after midnight.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist with the iguana being a 'terrible snitch' adds humor, and the joke is concise and specific."}

candidates.text: I told my friend we need a sleepover and she said, "I can't, I have plans." I said, "Great! You're coming over!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist with a clever play on expectations, concise and specific."}

candidates.text: Why did my friend uninvite me from her slumber party? She said I was the *sleep* of the problem!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is clever with a play on words ('sleep' vs. 'slumber'), but the punchline could be more tightly connected to the headline and slightly less forced."}

candidates.text: Why did my friend stop hosting slumber parties? Turns out, she was *asleep* of my jokes!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat clever with the pun on 'asleep of my jokes,' but it's a bit forced and lacks specificity. The setup could be more engaging, and the humor doesn't fully land due to awkward phrasing."}

candidates.text: I'm glad you're prioritizing sleep, but maybe don't make it a full-on party—your friends have lives too.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat relevant and has a mild twist, but lacks surprise and specificity. It's polite rather than funny and doesn't fully align with the playful tone of the headline."}
